Flow.interviewLabel: Vetting and Compliance - Capita - Activity History {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Vetting and Compliance - Capita - Activity History

fields.name: Header_Text2
fields.fieldText: Activity History

fields.name: From
fields.fieldText: From

validationRule.errorMessage: From date must be before To date

fields.name: Totext
fields.fieldText: To: {!ToDate}

value.stringValue: Please choose from the below Activity Types

fields.name: Activty_other
fields.fieldText: Please provide the other reason below:

fields.name: Text
fields.fieldText:
Please Note

If claiming Job Seekers Allowance, please detail the Job Centre

fields.name: What_was_your_method_of_support_during_this_time
fields.fieldText: What was your method of support during this time?

fields.name: Employer
fields.fieldText: Name of company:

fields.name: Company_Address
fields.fieldText: Company Address:

fields.name: Reference_name
fields.fieldText: Referee Name:

fields.name: Reference_contact_number
fields.fieldText: Referee Contact Number:

fields.name: Reference_email_address
fields.fieldText: Referee Email Address:

fields.name: I_acknowledge_that_Get_Candidate_Brand_c_will_verify_the_contents_of_my_registra
fields.fieldText: I acknowledge that Blue Arrow will verify the contents of my vetting including asking referees to provide a reference and that this falls into legitimate business interest as defined by the Data Protection Act 2018.

fields.name: Header_Text
fields.fieldText: Activity History

fields.name: Success_Text
fields.fieldText:
✔

Status: Completed

Date: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Document_Completed_Date__c}

fields.name: trex3
fields.fieldText:
In order to be eligible for work we require a detailed activity history from yourself since leaving school. This will include any periods in which you have been absent from employment including un-employment, higher education etc. Any employment references given in the last 3 years will also need extra details


School Leaving Date: {!SchoolDate}

fields.name: vdxczxvc
fields.fieldText: Outstanding Days: {!DaysToComplete}

fields.name: Prior_text_to_activity_history
fields.fieldText: You will now be required to complete your activity history starting with your most recent employer and working back to your school leaving age.

fields.name: Header_Text_0
fields.fieldText: Activity History

fields.name: trex3_0
fields.fieldText:
In order to be eligible for work we require a detailed activity history from yourself since leaving school. This will include any periods in which you have been absent from employment including un-employment, higher education etc.


We will be applying for employment referencing covering the last 3 years therefore we will require additional information to obtain these.

fields.name: School_Leaving_Date
fields.fieldText: School Leaving Date

fields.name: OutsideUK
fields.fieldText: Have you been outside of the UK for 6 months or more in the last 5 years?

fields.name: FromOutside
fields.fieldText: From

fields.name: ToOutside
fields.fieldText: To

fields.name: Country
fields.fieldText: Country

fields.name: Header_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText: Personal References

fields.name: First_and_Second_Personal_reference_header
fields.fieldText:
As a minimum you are required to provide us with two personal references (If you dont have 1 full years worth of employment history, please provide a third personal reference)


Please note that your personal reference cannot be a relative and you must have known them for at least 2 years or over

fields.name: First_Personal_reference_1
fields.fieldText: First Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box

fields.name: X1_Full_name_title
fields.fieldText: 1. Full name & title

fields.name: First_Personal_reference_2
fields.fieldText: First Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box

fields.name: X2_Job_title
fields.fieldText: 2. Job title

fields.name: First_Personal_reference_3
fields.fieldText: First Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box

fields.name: X3_Relationship_with_referee
fields.fieldText: 3. Relationship with referee

fields.name: First_Personal_reference_4
fields.fieldText: First Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box

fields.name: X4_Referee_s_Address
fields.fieldText: 4. Referees Address

fields.name: First_Personal_reference_5
fields.fieldText: First Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box

fields.name: X5_Referee_s_email_address_and_telephone_number
fields.fieldText: 5. Referees email address and telephone number

fields.name: First_Personal_reference_6
fields.fieldText: First Personal reference - please provide their following details using the drop down box below

fields.name: X6_Length_of_time_known_must_be_2_years_or_over
fields.fieldText: 6. Length of time known (must be 2 years or over)

fields.name: Second_Personal_reference_1
fields.fieldText: Second Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Y1_Full_name_title
fields.fieldText: 1. Full name & title

fields.name: Second_Personal_reference_2
fields.fieldText: Second Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Y2_Job_title
fields.fieldText: 2. Job title

fields.name: Second_Personal_reference_3
fields.fieldText: Second Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Y3_Relationship_with_referee
fields.fieldText: 3. Relationship with referee

fields.name: Second_Personal_reference_4
fields.fieldText: Second Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Y4_Referee_s_address
fields.fieldText: 4. Referees address

fields.name: Second_Personal_reference_5
fields.fieldText: Second Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Y5_Referee_s_email_address_and_telephone_number
fields.fieldText: 5. Referees email address and telephone number

fields.name: Second_Personal_reference_6
fields.fieldText: Second Personal reference - please provide their following details using the drop down box below

fields.name: Y6_Length_of_time_known_must_be_2_years_or_over
fields.fieldText: 6. Length of time known (must be 2 years or over)

fields.name: Third_Personal_reference_header
fields.fieldText: Third Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below (This is only required if you don't have 1 full years worth of employment history.)

fields.name: Z1_Full_name_title
fields.fieldText: 1. Full name & title

fields.name: Third_Personal_reference_3
fields.fieldText: Third Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Z2_Job_title
fields.fieldText: 2. Job title

fields.name: Third_Personal_reference_4
fields.fieldText: Third Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Z3_Relationship_with_referee
fields.fieldText: 3. Relationship with referee

fields.name: Third_Personal_reference_5
fields.fieldText: Third Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Z4_Referee_s_address
fields.fieldText: 4. Referees address

fields.name: Third_Personal_reference_6
fields.fieldText: Third Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below

fields.name: Z5_Referee_s_email_address_and_telephone_number
fields.fieldText: 5. Referees email address and telephone number

fields.name: Third_Personal_reference_7
fields.fieldText: Third Personal reference - please provide their following details using the drop down box below

fields.name: Z6_Length_of_time_known_must_be_2_years_or_over
fields.fieldText: 6. Length of time known (must be 2 years or over)

textTemplates.name: DocumentTextFinal
textTemplates.text:
Personal References


As a minimum you are required to provide us with two personal references (If you do not have 1 full years worth of employment history, please provide a third personal reference)


Please note that your personal reference cannot be a relative and you must have known them for at least 2 years or over


First Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box


1. Full name & title

{!X1_Full_name_title}


2. Job title

{!X2_Job_title}


3. Relationship with referee

{!X3_Relationship_with_referee}


4. Referee's Address

{!X4_Referee_s_Address}


5. Referee's email address and telephone number

{!X5_Referee_s_email_address_and_telephone_number}


6. Length of time known (must be 2 years or over)

{!X6_Length_of_time_known_must_be_2_years_or_over}


Second Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below


1. Full name & title

{!Y1_Full_name_title}


2. Job title

{!Y2_Job_title}


3. Relationship with referee

{!Y3_Relationship_with_referee}


4. Referees address

{!Y4_Referee_s_address}


5. Referees email address and telephone number

{!Y5_Referee_s_email_address_and_telephone_number}


6. Length of time known (must be 2 years or over)

{!Y6_Length_of_time_known_must_be_2_years_or_over}


Third Personal reference - please provide their following details using the free text box below (This is only required if you do not have 1 full years worth of employment history.)


1. Full name & title

{!Z1_Full_name_title}


2. Job title

{!Z2_Job_title}


3. Relationship with referee

{!Z3_Relationship_with_referee}


4. Referees address

{!Z4_Referee_s_address}


5. Referees email address and telephone number

{!Z5_Referee_s_email_address_and_telephone_number}


6. Length of time known (must be 2 years or over)

{!Z6_Length_of_time_known_must_be_2_years_or_over}



{!Get_Vetting_Document.Document_Text__c}

Status: Completed

Completed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

{!DocumentText}


﻿Confirmed By: {!Get_Candidate.Name}

Confirmed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}

textTemplates.name: DocumentTextHalf
textTemplates.text:
Activity History

School Leaving Date: {!School_Leaving_Date}

Have you been outside of the UK for 6 months or more in the last 5 years?

{!OutsideUK}

From: {!FromOutside}

To: {!ToOutside}

Country: {!Country}

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextEmployed
textTemplates.text:
Activity Type: {!Activity_Type.value}

Name of Company: {!Employer}

﻿Company Address:

{!Company_Address}

Reference Name: {!Reference_name}

Reference Contact Number: {!Reference_contact_number}

Reference Email Address: {!Reference_email_address}

Permission to contact: Yes

From: {!From}

To: {!ToDate}

textTemplates.name: SupportingTextOther
textTemplates.text:
Activity Type: {!Activity_Type.value}

Method of Support:

{!What_was_your_method_of_support_during_this_time}

From: {!From}

To: {!ToDate}
